mvw.mvw_command: cmake -S . -B build_minhw -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DHTTPLIB_TEST=ON -DHTTPLIB_USE_OPENSSL_IF_AVAILABLE=OFF -DHTTPLIB_USE_ZLIB_IF_AVAILABLE=OFF -DHTTPLIB_USE_BROTLI_IF_AVAILABLE=OFF -DHTTPLIB_USE_ZSTD_IF_AVAILABLE=OFF -DHTTPLIB_USE_NON_BLOCKING_GETADDRINFO=OFF && cmake --build build_minhw -j1 && ctest --test-dir build_minhw -j1 --output-on-failure
mvw.input_scale: cpp-httplib test target in Release mode, single-job build and single-job test
mvw.success_criteria: exit code 0 and ctest output contains '100% tests passed'

environment.methodology: tutorial.md one-pass profiling; process-group peak sampling every 0.5s for RAM/CPU/threads; whole process tree covered (including child processes and multi-thread activity).

static_triage.notes: C++ test build pulls GoogleTest via FetchContent and compiles large test translation unit.

peaks_observed.cpu_utilization_summary: Build phase CPU-bound with compiler/linker peaks; run phase low to moderate CPU during tests.

min_hardware.summary: 2 vCPU / 2 GB RAM / 1 GB disk, no GPU. Raw peaks: build RAM 1.6788 GB, run RAM 0.5394 GB, disk 0.0386 GB.
